meta.site_description: Custom four-level modern Colonial in North Arlington — 6 bedrooms, 7.5 baths, 7,584 sq ft, rooftop deck. Built 2025. Listed at $2,845,000.

tagline: One of North Arlington's largest and most thoughtfully built new homes — 7,500+ sq ft across four finished levels.
description:
Most new builds in North Arlington give you space or flexibility — not both. This custom four-level residence delivers a refined home with five ensuite bedrooms, a chef's kitchen with Sub-Zero and Wolf appliances, and wide-plank solid wood floors — plus two levels that adapt to how your family actually lives.

Designed by Eustilus Architects, built by All Terrain Contracting, and completed in 2025, this is not a copy-paste spec home but a carefully executed custom modern Colonial. A dramatic open-riser white oak staircase anchors the home, connecting spaces that feel both open and intentional. Custom hand-built cabinetry runs throughout the kitchen, wet bars, and bathrooms.

The second level features five spacious ensuite bedrooms, each with a walk-in closet — a rare combination of scale and privacy. The vaulted top floor serves as a true flex space with a full bath, wet bar, generous storage, and access to a private rooftop deck with treetop views. The daylit walk-out lower level, with its own entrance, is well suited for guests, an au pair, or multi-generational living.

Built for longevity: solid 2x6 framing, brick and cement exterior, premium Pella windows, three-zone HVAC, and dual oversized tankless water heaters. Set on a quiet, tree-lined street in the heart of Waverly Hills — 0.9 miles to Ballston Metro and 0.6 miles to the Langston Boulevard corridor.

items: Designed by Eustilus Architects, built by All Terrain Contracting
Completed 2025 — custom new construction, not spec
Solid 2x6 framing, brick and HardiPlank cement exterior
Premium Pella windows throughout
Concrete perimeter foundation
Asphalt and metal roof
Open-riser white oak staircase as central architectural feature
Wide-plank solid hardwood floors spanning three levels
Custom hand-built cabinetry in kitchen, wet bars, and baths
Chef's kitchen with Sub-Zero refrigerator and Wolf appliances
Gas fireplace
Wet bars on multiple levels
6 bedrooms total — 5 ensuite on second level, each with walk-in closet
7 full baths + 1 half bath
Vaulted top floor with full bath, wet bar, and rooftop deck access
Walk-out lower level bedroom suite with own entrance
Lower level suited for guests, au pair, or multi-generational living
Three-zone HVAC (forced air + heat pump)
Dual oversized tankless water heaters
Public sewer and water
2-car garage
No HOA

highlights: 0.9 miles to Ballston Metro (Silver & Orange lines)
0.6 miles to Langston Boulevard retail corridor
Access to Custis Trail — bike to Georgetown in ~20–25 min
Quiet, tree-lined street in the 22207 zip code
